holdings.infoBox: QQQM is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.10%, Apple at 6.94%, Micron Technology at 4.95%, Microsoft at 4.71%, and Amazon.com at 4.16%.

overview.description: The Invesco NASDAQ 100 ETF (QQQM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index. The fund is passively managed to track a modified-market-cap weighted narrow index of 100 NASDAQ-listed stocks, excluding financials. QQQM was launched on Oct 13, 2020 and is issued by Invesco.
